nodes.label: This property can be used as a prefix for any HTTP method call to return
An alternative to `.with_raw_response` that doesn't eagerly read the response bo
Create Agent          Args:           model: Model identifier.          Accepts
Get Agent          Args:           version: Agent version.          Omit for the
Update Agent          Args:           version: The agent's current version, used
List Agents          Args:           created_at_gte: Return agents created at or
Archive Agent          Args:           betas: Optional header to specify the bet
